# databasus_all_workspaces (Data Source)

A data source to get a list of all configured Workspaces in Databasus

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "databasus_all_workspaces" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `workspaces` (Attributes List) List of all existing workspaces. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces))

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the workspace was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the workspace.
- `name` (String) Name of the workspace.
